message:
feat(wasm-import): add JS polyfill wrapper following zero-copy pattern

Phase 3.2 Complete - JS Wrapper:
- Added __wasm_import() polyfill in runtime.js
- Thin JS wrapper: delegates to native __edgebox_wasm_import/call
- Zero-copy: path passed on each call, no JS-side module handle
- Returns namespace object with callable functions (add, multiply, subtract, fibonacci)
- Comprehensive test with assertions + 100k call benchmark

Technical Details:
- Fixed JS_IsArray() call (takes 1 arg, not 2)
- Follows existing fetch polyfill pattern
- Debug logging with [WASM_IMPORT] prefix
- Error handling with descriptive messages

Status:
✅ Phase 1: WASM loader + type conversion (Committed: 6be5a3e)
✅ Phase 2: WAMR host functions (Committed: 0910c3b)
✅ Phase 3.1: Native bindings (Committed: a0487c8)
✅ Phase 3.2: JS polyfill wrapper (This commit)
✅ Phase 3.3: Test file with assertions + benchmark
⏭️ Next: QuickJS import hook for `import * as math from "./math.wasm"` syntax

Note: Native CLI build works. WASM build has unrelated frozen_functions error.

Related: WASM_IMPORTS_STATUS.md, WASM_IMPORTS_DESIGN.md
